description: Get these downright gorgeous lace-up full brogue Oxford shoes made of fine brown leather from the house of ganuchi, for that hint of cool in your otherwise sobre formal wardrobe.UpperLeather upper with supple leather inner lining for comfortWingtip brogue upper for maximum styleLace-up system for a snug, customised FitPadded footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole in sand grain texture for absolute grip and tractionRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleshoe careWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
